name: Mine Collapse
desc_clean: Umbra X While Morsels seem to be quick workers in their mine, they do not appear to be the most intelligent and have been the cause of many easily avoided accidents.

Morsel.definition_short: Mała jednostka-jedzenie zjadana przez Gorge units.

Quick.definition_short: Jednostka atakuje PRZED wrogami na tym samym piętrze.

mechanic_summary: Mine Collapse to Spell klanu Umbra. Umbra X While Morsels seem to be quick workers in their mine, they do not appear to be the most intelligent and have been the cause of many easily avoided accidents. Keywords: Morsel, Quick.
wiki_desc: Umbra X While Morsels seem to be quick workers in their mine, they do not appear to be the most intelligent and have been the cause of many easily avoided accidents. I can only hope this will not be the case aboard the train.
